title: Test 01 - Part B - Extract 1
subtitle: Chest Pain Admission Update
transcript:
Okay, so the next thing is about Suzie Williams in bed 3.
Right.
She's been admitted for chest pain to rule out MI.
So far she had an EKG which was okay,
and the first set of cardiac enzymes and troponins are negative.
When she came in, her blood pressure was elevated a little, like 182 over 95,
but she was given losartan and at 6 o'clock it was 142 over 82.
She was also dehydrated so we started her on IV fluids,
D5 half-normal saline running at 125 millilitres.
That can go until midnight and then it can be disconnected.
She's scheduled for a stress test tomorrow and some more enzyme tests.
Okay?
Okay.

She was also dehydrated so we started her on IV fluids,

That can go until midnight and then it can be disconnected.
She's scheduled for a stress test tomorrow and some more enzyme tests.
